title: Chunk to Meaning
purpose: Link accurate chunk-based reading moves to morphology-based meaning proof in one short sequence.
anchor_skill: decode accurately, then prove meaning with a word-part signal
win_condition: Students score best when they decode accurately, choose the strongest meaning, and explain the signal that proves it.
teacher_note: Run the foundational move first so the morphology extension feels like payoff, not a disconnected second task.
